name: datocms
description: DatoCMS skills for content delivery, content management, content modeling, CLI workflows, frontend integrations, plugin development, plugin UI design, plugin scaffolding, and project setup

interface.shortDescription: Content delivery, management, modeling, CLI, frontend integrations, plugin dev, and project setup for DatoCMS
interface.longDescription: Focused DatoCMS skills for querying content (CDA/GraphQL), managing records and schema (CMA), making content-modeling decisions (models vs blocks, taxonomies, reuse, limits, admin UI), running CLI workflows and migrations, integrating with frontend frameworks (Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, SvelteKit), building and designing DatoCMS plugins, scaffolding new plugin projects, and orchestrating project setup including draft mode, visual editing, previews, and imports.
